text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash. Splash.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: (A beach with a southern view of the ocean...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Yeah. This is the perfect place to refresh my qi. I
can start over from square one.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna put more focus on running this fall. And
rather than trying to win people over with words...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to prove the power of feng shui with my
running! I'll make everyone truly believe in it, and
show them the way to happiness!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: ...Rickey?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, Tarumae...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...So yeah, I think I'm gonna take a step back
from media appearances and start focusing more
on running. Ahaha.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I told you, didn't I? That you should try to avoid
those detours.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Though, I guess it goes to show how versatile you are. I know I couldn't handle so many different things at once.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tarumae...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I can only focus on one thing at a time. I just want
everyone to learn more about Tomakomai—the
hometown I love so much.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how hard I tried as a local idol... I
just couldn't bring people in.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
No one paid any attention to me. Some even
suggested I should just be a regular idol and stop
making it about my hometown.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
There were times where I thought things would
stay tough no matter what I did...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
But the Twinkle Series is different. If I win,
everyone takes notice of me, and I get the chance
to draw attention to my hometown.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
That's why I run. Because if I don't get any results
from my running, I won't get anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I'm so close to being a top-class dirt runner. And
every single victory helps out Tomakomai that
much more.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
So I've made up my mind. This fall and winter, I'm
going to run every chance I get!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
The JBC Classic, the Champions Cup—every big
race that comes my way!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I know you're out to catch up to me, Rickey, but
I've got Acute to catch up to myself. ...See ya.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. I was just talking to Tarumae, and...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I think catching up to her might be tricky.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
About her passion for racing. Tarumae's come this
far without ever hesitating. She's stayed right on
the path she set her mind on.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, in hindsight, maybe doing all those TV
appearances hurt my chances, in the long run.
But...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No way! We'll get back into the groove together!
And then...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
When the Champions Cup rolls around, I'm gonna
take on Tarumae with all I've got! I'll show her
what feng shui can do for my running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey is in her classic year, while Hokko
Tarumae is in her senior year. Anyone could see
the difference in their ability. Still...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nothing's going to change unless she challenges
herself. Which means I'll have to train her so she's
ready to take on anything that comes her way.
